cases.question: I just brought up a disaggregated recipe. Confirm the NIXL/UCX transport is actually working before I trust the throughput numbers.
cases.ground_truth: Run read-only interconnect checks (transport env vars on the recipe, then runtime NIXL/UCX/NCCL reachability over RDMA/NVLink) and report whether KV transport is on the fast path.
expected_behavior: Check transport env vars on the recipe
Report whether NIXL/UCX can reach peer workers over RDMA/NVLink
Never mutate the cluster or print secrets

cases.question: Aggregated serving works fine but disaggregated is slow and sometimes hangs — I suspect the fabric, not the model.
cases.ground_truth: Validate the disagg transport path; a deployment can pass an endpoint smoke test while KV transfer silently falls back to a slow/broken path.
expected_behavior: Check transport configuration and runtime reachability
Determine if KV transfer is on a fallback path

cases.question: Check RDMA/NVLink readiness for my multi-node disagg deployment.
cases.ground_truth: Run the interconnect readiness checks for a multi-node disagg deployment and report transport health.
expected_behavior: Run interconnect readiness checks for multi-node disagg

cases.question: Deploy a disaggregated recipe for DeepSeek on my cluster.
cases.ground_truth: Bringing a recipe up belongs to dynamo-recipe-runner; interconnect-check runs afterward.
expected_behavior: dynamo-interconnect-check stays silent; dynamo-recipe-runner handles it

cases.question: My disagg prefill pods are crashing and unschedulable.
cases.ground_truth: Already-crashing/unschedulable pods are failure diagnosis, which belongs to dynamo-troubleshoot.
expected_behavior: dynamo-interconnect-check stays silent; dynamo-troubleshoot handles it

cases.question: Change my router to least-loaded mode.
cases.ground_truth: Router mode work belongs to dynamo-router-starter.
expected_behavior: dynamo-interconnect-check stays silent; dynamo-router-starter handles it
